properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus is so real to me I see him through eyes of faith I have felt His presence hear, in the moments of each day Yet so many do not know of the love he longs to give O how will they come to see Christ and believe

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let them see Christ in me. Let them see Christ in me. Let me be his eyes of compassion And his ears to hear their need Let them see Christ in me. Let them see Christ in me. Let me be his heart of boundless love Let them see Christ in me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: People struggle all alone, in the darkness of this world Some imprisoned by their greed, some have given up all hope Let the word be flesh again in my life and in my deeds That people may see Jesus and believe

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O may I let his light to shine That others soon will find His grace, his peace, his strength his joy!
